examples.text: Despite the intuition that something drastic needs to be done about such a costly problem, economic analyses clearly show it will be far more expensive to cut carbon dioxide emissions radically than to pay the costs of adaptation to the increased temperatures/A model by one of the main authors of the United Nations Climate Change Panel shows how an expected temperature increase of 2.1 degrees in 2100 would only be diminished to an increase of 1.9 degrees.
examples.explanation: 尽管人们直觉认为需要对这种高成本问题采取严厉措施，但经济分析明确表明，彻底削减二氧化碳排放的成本远高于承担气温升高带来的适应费用/联合国气候变化专门委员会主要作者之一建立的模型显示，到2100年预期的2.1摄氏度升温仅能降至1.9摄氏度。
